subcodes.title: Words to the Baha'is, spoken on 1912-08-05
subcodes.first_line: It has always been the practice of the heedless to hold back the sincere ones from the Cause of God. As for a trap, praise be to God that we have been trapped happily for sixty years
subcodes.first_line_orig: همیشه این دأب غافلین بوده که مخلصین را از امر الله منع می نمودند اما دام الحمد لله ما شصت سال است در این دام خوشیم و ابداً فکر فراری نداریم
subcodes.subjects: @prejudice; racial prejudice; class distinction, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @unity; oneness of humanity, @love of God
